It counts how many cards you have played this turn and it does things with it.

"how much spell did I played this turn ? I forgot"
It's extremely annoying to count because there are times when counter wars go on

Counters are arguably a bit easier
You just check how many hits your attacks do (and multiply the number by the counter number) and minus it against your current health first
If the counter damage is higher than your current health+shield, GG
